So if a man is influencing a woman, you want to stand face to face, or if you're at a table sitting across a table, you want to sit across from a woman. You don't want to sit to the side of a woman. I keep my hands in plain sight of a woman all the time. You don't want to drop, you drop your hands here. The woman, what do you feel right now? She's all of a sudden, it's like, immediately creates whatever it is. It's an intuitive evolutionary thing. It's suspicion with him. What do you feel about my hands right now? There's nothing. He said, he would never get it. The man would not be intimidated by what my hands are. A woman needs to see your hands. Now, I'm not making up. This has been tested.
